Package org.areslib.templates

Class LinearMechanismIOSim

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.templates.LinearMechanismIOSim
All Implemented Interfaces:
LinearMechanismIO
public class LinearMechanismIOSim extends Object implements LinearMechanismIO
Simulation implementation of LinearMechanismIO for desktop testing.

Models an elevator/slide with gravity, motor response, and configurable travel limits.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface org.areslib.templates.LinearMechanismIO

  • Constructor Details

    • LinearMechanismIOSim

      public LinearMechanismIOSim(double maxHeightMeters, double kV, double kFriction, double gravityCompensationVolts)
      Creates a linear mechanism simulation.
      Parameters:
      maxHeightMeters - Maximum travel in meters.
      kV - Motor response: m/s gained per volt per second.
      kFriction - Friction coefficient.
      gravityCompensationVolts - Voltage needed to hold position against gravity (0 for horizontal mechanisms).

    • LinearMechanismIOSim

      public LinearMechanismIOSim()
      Default constructor for a typical FTC slide mechanism.

      public void setVoltage(double volts)
      Description copied from interface: LinearMechanismIO
      Commands the mechanism to a given voltage.

      setVoltage in interface LinearMechanismIO
      Parameters:
      volts - Voltage to apply (-12.0 to 12.0).

      Description copied from interface: LinearMechanismIO
      Commands the mechanism to move to a target position using closed-loop control.
